mechanism: Non-main pushes deploy to test. Merged PRs and manual prod dispatches deploy to prod. Each workflow encodes this as job-level if: conditions backed by GitHub Environment protection rules.
why: Without an enforced gate, a single push can alter production infrastructure with no prior validation.

related.note: Promotion gate targets oases-test for validation.
Each workflow encodes its own gate independently.
BigBang exercises the promotion path weekly.

violations: Workflow deploying to prod from a non-main branch without manual dispatch.
Workflow missing the test job entirely.
